Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class FuturesEnrollmentMetadata

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.FuturesEnrollmentMetadata
public class FuturesEnrollmentMetadata extends Object
FuturesEnrollmentMetadata

Metadata for the REGISTRATION_FUTURES enrollment type
